description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages test27 and test34 and a postgres service. Define a variable POSTGRES_DB=pygcat. Add a py27 job in stage test27 that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -y python-virtualenv python-psycopg2 python-tox python3-setuptools postgresql-client, exports PGHOST=postgres PGUSER=postgres PGPORT=5432 PGDATABASE=pygcat, loads the test database with psql < datas/pygcat_test.sql, and executes tox -e py27 testenv. Add a py34 job in stage test34 that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-virtualenv python3-psycopg2 python-tox python3-setuptools postgresql-client, sets the same PG* variables, loads the same SQL file, and runs tox -e py34 testenv. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
